versions_json.description: One row per SuperCombo Patch Notes table version row, with raw capture pointers and detail page counts.

official_battle_change_crosswalk_json.description: Explicit mapping from SuperCombo version pages to Capcom official battle_change version IDs when linked by SuperCombo.

change_events_json.description: Top-level SuperCombo Patch Notes bullets with nested detail bullets and table text preserved as community change events.

move_change_index_json.description: Community change events grouped by fighter/system scope and target title for cause-finding queries.

key_fields.version: SuperCombo SF6_Versions.version display value from rendered Cargo table.
key_fields.gameversion: SuperCombo SF6_Versions.gameversion from rendered Cargo table and version template.
key_fields.official_battle_change_id_from_link: Date/version ID parsed from the external Capcom battle_change URL in the SuperCombo Patch Notes links column.
key_fields.capture_validation_status: Status from each raw detail page validation.json.

authority_policy: Capcom official battle_change remains official source for official update text. SuperCombo change-events and move-change-index are community source indexes that preserve SuperCombo wording, explanatory notes, and explicit links to official Battle Change IDs when present.
